_comment: Codex plugin hooks. Referenced from .codex-plugin/plugin.json, which makes Codex use this file instead of the default hooks/hooks.json. Same event schema as Claude; Codex exposes ${PLUGIN_ROOT} (and ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} for compatibility). The 'codex' argument points ship.sh/busy.sh's double-wiring guard at ~/.codex/hooks.json.
